text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, Mejiro Dober asks me to come with
her to speak with Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She thanks Air Groove for guiding her all this
time, handing her a single flower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The flower is a yellow carnation—a declaration of
challenge to Air Groove and a promise that
Mejiro Dober will surpass her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove willingly accepts her challenge and
promises to see her again at the Queen Elizabeth
II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relieved she was able to voice her desires in front
of both Air Groove and me, a smile spreads
across Mejiro Dober's face.
